title: Transfr Trek
description: I maintained a Unity product SDK at the senior level, working in cross-functional teams and architecting key infrastructure for a live VR product with thousands of users.

title: Synthetic training data for real-time computer vision (Unity/NDA)
description: I enabled the machine learning researchers on my team to apply novel CV and sensor fusion techniques in a real-time virtual 3D environment. I wrote compute shaders for some of these projects which involved sim-to-real ML obstacle avoidance training of a real world robot.

title: AR assistant for retail application on the Hololens (Finger Food/Unity/NDA)
description: I implemented and enabled innovation of novel UI/UX design by working closely on a design-led team. Optimization in Unity for the Hololens in a resource-heavy application was key. I will never hear "bread, milk, eggs" the same way again.

title: Animated mascot for Twitch overlay (personal project)
description: (2020) I made a swimming shark overlay in Unity for SomnaMusic, who is a Twitch Partner streamer.

title: Augmented Reality Business Card (MAMMOTH XR)
description: (2019) Mobile AR business cards for myself and coworkers using Unity (Android/iOS) and the 8th Wall SDK. I also captured everyone's head using Intel RealSense photogrammetry.

title: Thunder (MAMMOTH XR)
description: (2019) A Blackfoot language learning VR game for Oculus Go using Unity and the Oculus SDK. It was invited to the Vancouver and Nashville International Film Festivals in 2019. I also did sound design in Ableton.

title: PASS (MAMMOTH XR)
description: (2018) An Oculus Go port of MAMMOTH's fire extinguisher training in Unreal Engine 4. I did extensive optimization of the extinguishing mechanic and environments for mobile VR.
